testcase.name: test_admin_login

error.message: failed on setup with "requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/v1/auth/login': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/v1/auth/login?"

Perhaps you meant https:///api/v1/auth/login?
